name: Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate sales tax calculations cause compliance issues. We automate sales tax calculation and remittance instead of manual calculations or generic accounting software.
problem_solved: Inaccurate sales tax calculations leading to compliance issues.
features: User-friendly dashboard for tracking sales tax obligations
